title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yum! Brands India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yum! Brands India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India:
Yum! Brands India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
